headline: PG&E Unveils First-of-its-kind Monitoring Hub That Helped Prevent 17 Wildfires and Over a Thousand Outages
summary: OAKLAND, Calif. - May is Wildfire Awareness Month and today Pacific Gas and Electric Company unveils its new Continuous Monitoring Center , a first-of-its-kind centralized hub that continuously...
